name: Betta (Yonkagor)
description:
Oh waterland~

What to expect:

You will first meet Betta and have free reign to do whatever you want just have fun :3

I've seen like no Betta bots and since I already have a persona on the ready might as well use it to make this and experiment with a few extra parts. I had no clue what I was going for but enjoy~.
